context.role: highest happiness state (90+), rare reward behavior, unlocked at relationship level 4
context.usage_scenario: plays for 8 seconds when happiness is 90+ and random trigger occurs, shows Echo's peak contentment, accompanied by actual cockatiel whistle sound

visual_specification.shape: cockatiel with crest fully raised, beak open, singing posture
visual_specification.texture: pixel art with minimal dithering, hand-drawn organic feel
visual_specification.outline: 1px dark outline (#1D2B53) on key features only

animation.description: F1-2: crest raises, F3-4: beak opens, F5-6: body sways, F7-8: beak closes, repeat

visual_specification.details: crest fully raised and prominent (#FFEC27), beak opens and closes rhythmically, eyes bright and alert, slight body sway, musical note particles (♪ #FFEC27) spawn and float upward, cheek patch vibrant

relationships.shared_with: all Echo states share same base body structure and color palette
relationships.differences_from: unique open-beak singing pose, fully raised crest, musical note particle effects, highest-tier reward state, requires 90+ happiness

explicit_negations: no motion blur or tweening between frames
no visible sound waves (musical notes only)
no multiple simultaneous notes (1-2 at a time max)
